field.label: Enable FRP Client
field.help: Enable or disable the FRP client (frpc).

field.label: Server Address
field.help: FRP server hostname or IP address.

field.label: Server Port
field.help: FRP server port (default: 7000).

field.label: Authentication Method
field.help: Authentication method for connecting to the server.

field.label: Authentication Token
field.help: Token for server authentication.

field.label: Exit on Login Failure
field.help: If disabled, frpc will keep retrying on login failure (recommended for cross-border).

field.label: Log Level
field.help: FRP client logging verbosity.

field.label: Transport Protocol
field.help: Transport protocol. WSS/WebSocket disguise FRP as HTTP(S) traffic. KCP and QUIC use UDP for better cross-border performance.

field.label: TCP Multiplexing
field.help: Enable TCP multiplexing (recommended for cross-border tunnels).

field.label: TCP Mux Keepalive Interval
field.help: TCP mux keepalive interval in seconds (default: 10).

field.label: Heartbeat Interval
field.help: Heartbeat interval in seconds (default: 10).

field.label: Heartbeat Timeout
field.help: Heartbeat timeout in seconds (default: 30).

field.label: Enable TLS
field.help: Enable TLS for server connection.

field.label: TLS Server Name
field.help: Optional TLS SNI server name.

field.label: Connection Pool Size
field.help: Number of connections to pool (default: 5).

field.label: Connection Timeout
field.help: Timeout in seconds for dialing to the server (default: 10, range: 1-120).

field.label: Keepalive Interval
field.help: Keepalive interval in seconds for the connection to the server (default: 7200, -1 to disable).

field.label: Proxy URL
field.help: Connect to FRP server through an upstream proxy. Format: http://host:port or socks5://host:port.

field.label: QUIC Keepalive Period
field.help: QUIC keepalive ping interval in seconds (default: 10). Only used when transport protocol is QUIC.

field.label: QUIC Max Idle Timeout
field.help: Max QUIC idle time in seconds before connection closes (default: 30).

field.label: QUIC Max Streams
field.help: Max concurrent QUIC streams (default: 100000).

field.label: Enable Admin Dashboard
field.help: Enable the FRP client admin dashboard (webServer). Required for traffic monitoring.

field.label: Dashboard Listen Address
field.help: Address for the admin dashboard to listen on (default: 127.0.0.1).

field.label: Dashboard Port
field.help: Port for the admin dashboard (default: 7400).

field.label: Dashboard Username
field.help: Username for dashboard authentication (optional).

field.label: Dashboard Password
field.help: Password for dashboard authentication (optional).

field.label: Enable BBR
field.help: Enables BBR congestion control. WARNING: This is a system-wide kernel setting that affects ALL TCP connections, not just FRP.

field.label: Enable MSS Clamping
field.help: Clamps TCP MSS for FRP tunnel traffic only (to/from the configured FRP server). WARNING: Requires a valid Server Address above.

field.label: MSS Value
field.help: Maximum Segment Size in bytes (default: 1260, range: 536-1460).
